headline: Scotiabank Maintains Sector Outperform on Welltower, Raises Price Target to $236
summary: Scotiabank  analyst Nicholas Yulico   maintains Welltower (NYSE:WELL) with a Sector Outperform and raises the price target from $214 to $236.

raw.headline: Scotiabank Maintains Sector Outperform on Welltower, Raises Price Target to $236

headline: REIT ETFs in the Spotlight as U.S. Mortgage Rate Sinks Below 6%
summary: REIT ETFs, like SCHH, are in focus after the 30-year mortgage rate dipped to 5.98%, boosting real estate valuations and dividend appeal.
